name: io.github.Codeturion/codesurface
description: Indexes your codebase's public API and serves it via compact MCP tool responses.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the indexed API by keyword. Find classes, methods, properties, fields, and events.

tools.name: get_signature
tools.description: Look up the exact signature of an API member by name or FQN.

tools.name: get_class
tools.description: Get a complete reference card for a class with all public members.

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get a quick overview of the indexed codebase.

tools.name: reindex
tools.description: Incrementally update the index by re-parsing only changed, new, or deleted files.
